# scopes-csv

RBAC scopes as bracketed CSV fallback path

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/rbac/scopes-csv` |

## Input

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
data:
  policy.default: role:readonly
  scopes: '[groups, email]'
  policy.csv: |
    p, role:readonly, applications, get, */*, allow
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    rbac:
      default: role:readonly
      policyCSV: |
        p, role:readonly, applications, get, */*, allow
      scopes:
      - groups
      - email
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-cmd-params-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

### `argocd-rbac-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  policy.csv: |
    p, role:readonly, applications, get, */*, allow
  policy.default: role:readonly
  scopes: |-
    - groups
    - email
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
